subcodes.first_line: O true friends of the manifest Truth! Praise be to God that, through His bounty and supreme grace, the lights of reality have shone upon both East and West [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان حقیقی حق مبین الحمد لله بفضل و موهبت کبری انوار حقیقت بر شرق و غرب
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @high station of the true believer, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
